channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 17th March
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please lift and relay x1 raised rocking broken 600x600x20mm slab (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 17th March
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please lift and relay x2 sunken 600x600x20mm slab (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 17th March
item.description:
